title: Figure — The Dreamer
description: A contemplative figure sculpted from air-dry clay and dressed in hand-sewn linen garments. The facial features are intentionally minimal, inviting the viewer to project their own emotions.

title: Figure — The Wanderer
description: A standing figure with articulated joints, wearing layers of naturally dyed fabrics. The posture suggests movement and curiosity.

title: Figure — The Guardian
description: A protective figure inspired by folklore traditions. Hand-painted features and embroidered details create a sense of warmth and care.

title: Pair — Day and Night
description: A pair of complementary figures representing duality. One is dressed in light, airy fabrics while the other wears dark, textured materials.

title: Miniature — Seed
description: A tiny, nestled figure curled in a seed-like form. Designed to fit in the palm of a hand, it explores themes of potential and rest.

title: Figure — The Listener
description: A seated figure with an inclined head, as if listening intently. The oversized ears are a playful exaggeration that adds character and whimsy.
